testSummary: web unit: 94 passed / 4 skipped (incl. 38 new automation layout/model/mutate/orthogonal-path tests). local-api integration (real Postgres cdp): 194 passed / 0 failed (incl. 5 new get-automation round-trip + cross-workspace-404 + invalid-graph-refusal). No regression.
e2eSummary: Full Playwright suite (cdp_e2e stack, cold run): 77 passed, 1 flaky (company-ses-config 'element is not stable' — UNRELATED pre-existing timing flake in an untouched file; passed on retry). New automation-builder.browser.e2e.spec.ts 7/7 (render seeded tree + axis-aligned/down-only connectors, assemble linear + if-branch, 8-type palette, save/reload round-trip, delete re-links, last-exit-delete refused with styled toast). Migrated broadcast-and-automation 'build and save a automation workflow' to the (+)-insertion model: 12/12.
notes: Phase 5 complete, test-first, on branch feat/automation-builder (NOT pushed). The placeholder AutomationBuilder.tsx is replaced with a constrained downward canvas: pure auto-layout (Reingold-Tilford two-pass, depth->y down-only by construction, subtree-width x packing, condition arms fan sideways, diamond join counted once below both parents), rounded orthogonal SVG connectors (V/H + clamped Q corners, diagonal-free, never up/back; container data-testid=automation-connectors), (+) edge insertion (insertOnEdge: A->B => A->NEW->B; condition auto-wires onTrue->B + onFalse->fresh exit) and delete (splice single-out / remove condition keeping onTrue arm + dropping onFalse-exclusive descendants; refuses trigger + last-exit). Canvas<->DSL via parseDefinition/buildDefinition (round-trip identity; NO stored coords). 8-type palette (wait/wait-until/hour-window/if/send/update-profile/webhook/exit) yields structurally-valid stubs via defaultNodeConfig (per-node editors are PHASE 6 — not built). Backend gap filled: GET /automations/:id (getAutomation, manage_content, scopedQuery on ctx.workspaceId, cross-workspace 404) for reload/round-trip; no migration (definition is existing jsonb). Save via POST/PUT /automations (already validate). Invariants honored: no native dialogs (askConfirm/showToast), server Buttons return the promise so the kit auto-locks+spins, every emitted graph re-gated by the production validateAutomationDefinition, workspace_id never client-supplied. lintOk=true means NO NEW lint errors in my files; the 7 KNOWN pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps 'rule not found' errors in untouched files remain (per the task instruction to ignore them). Removed the superseded thin web/src/automations/builder.ts + its obsolete web/test/automation-builder.test.ts (coverage now in model/mutate/layout tests). vite.config.ts test.include extended to src/**/*.test.ts so the co-located unit tests run. Version bumped 0.32.0->0.33.0; CLAUDE.md updated with the automation canvas section. Human steps: none (no AWS/DNS/migrations).
